user.title: Incendis Catalunya
user.description: Set the location to monitor and the two tracking radii. You can drag the marker and resize the circle on the map; both default to your Home Assistant home location.

data_description.location: The map's circle sets the tracking radius: fires inside it are tracked (counters, geo_location entities). Default 100 km.
data_description.alert_radius: Fires inside this smaller radius trigger the "fire nearby" binary sensor and events. Must not be larger than the tracking radius.

filters.title: Filters and polling
filters.description: Choose which fires to track and how often to check for updates.

data_description.subtipus: Only fires of these subtypes are tracked. Default: forest fires only.
data_description.active_phases: Phases counted as "active" for the counters and the fire-nearby sensor.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in minutes) to poll the Bombers live feed. Range 1-60.
data_description.min_vehicles: Ignore incidents with fewer than this many vehicles assigned. 0 disables this filter.

reconfigure.title: Incendis Catalunya
reconfigure.description: Move the monitored location or change the tracking radii. You can drag the marker and resize the circle on the map.

data_description.location: The map's circle sets the tracking radius: fires inside it are tracked (counters, geo_location entities).
data_description.alert_radius: Fires inside this smaller radius trigger the "fire nearby" binary sensor and events. Must not be larger than the tracking radius.

error.alert_gt_track: The alert radius must not be larger than the tracking radius.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single configuration possible.

init.title: Incendis Catalunya options
init.description: Change the incident filters, polling interval and the high-risk threshold.

data_description.subtipus: Only fires of these subtypes are tracked. Default: forest fires only.
data_description.active_phases: Phases counted as "active" for the counters and the fire-nearby sensor.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in minutes) to poll the Bombers live feed. Range 1-60.
data_description.min_vehicles: Ignore incidents with fewer than this many vehicles assigned. 0 disables this filter.
data_description.high_risk_threshold: Pla Alfa risk level (0-4) at or above which binary_sensor.high_risk turns on.

service_degraded.title: Incendis Catalunya can't reach the FeatureServer
service_degraded.description: The integration has failed to query the Bombers FeatureServer several times in a row with an error suggesting its address or schema has changed: {error}. Wildfire data may be stale until this is fixed. Please open an issue on the integration's GitHub repository with these details.
